About Me

Where creativity meets strategy

I'm a creative director, product designer, graphic designer, photographer, and videographer — passionate about building meaningful experiences through design, storytelling, and digital culture. Over 3+ years embedded in Africa's entertainment and media space.

Whether it's a viral social strategy, a polished app prototype, a brand photoshoot, or an event video — I bring the same level of intentionality to every project. I help brands and artists connect with people in authentic, impactful ways.

Product Design

Apps built around people

End-to-end UI/UX design — from user research and persona development through wireframing, prototyping, and polished interfaces.

01
Mobile App — Food Tech
FFO — Food Feelings Only
Personal Project | Figma Prototype

A food tracking app that goes beyond calories — helping users understand the emotional connection they have with food. Users log meals, rate emotions before and after eating, and receive personalised insights. Warm, minimal UI with a signature yellow identity built for daily habit formation.

✦ Validated with 25–35 demographic testers — strong positive response. Clean, consistent UI across 8+ screens.
02
Mobile App — News & Media
NEWE — New & Engaging Worldwide Events
Personal Project

A personalised news aggregation app designed to cut through information overload. Delivers content from verified sources customised by interest and reading behaviour. Clean reading-first UI with smart categorisation optimised for mobile.

✦ Full prototype: interest-tagging onboarding, personalised feed, sports section, and article detail screens — ready for development handoff.

Graphic Design

Visuals that tell stories

From music artwork to brand flyers and social banners — every piece crafted with intention, cultural resonance, and visual impact.

03
Social Media — Entertainment
Afrobeat Legends Banner Series
Trickle Media, Accra

A banner series celebrating Afrobeat icons from Ghana and Nigeria — two distinct visual treatments capturing energy, heritage, and the breadth of the genre.

✦ "Captured the essence of Afrobeat and its legends perfectly." — Trickle Media. Strong organic engagement on both versions.
04
Music Artwork — Single Cover
"Wash My Sins" Single Cover
Tonga Music

Cover artwork built around themes of cleansing and redemption. Raw, visceral imagery — figures in a river — with careful use of light and shadow creating atmosphere without over-producing the emotion.

✦ "Powerful and evocative." Widely shared across streaming platforms with strong organic fan response.
05
Print & Digital — Flyer
Travel Rite Promotional Flyer
Travel Rite Agency

A promotional flyer communicating Travel Rite's full service range — study abroad, hotel reservations, tour guiding, ticketing, and travel planning — in a single visually compelling piece.

✦ Direct increase in client enquiries and bookings reported following distribution.

Videography & Photography

Behind the lens

From podcast studio setups and brand video production to model shoots and product photography — full creative process on set.

06
Video Production — Studio
Brand & Podcast Video Production
Multiple Clients — Accra, Ghana

Full video production including studio setup, lighting design, camera operation, and directing for podcast recordings and brand launch videos. Experienced with professional camera rigs, softboxes, and multi-subject setups.

✦ Produced content for brand launches, the HUH podcast series, and commercial video shoots across Accra.
07
Brand Video — Commercial
Commercial Ad Videos
Air Freshener Brand & Auto Parts Store

Short-form commercial brand videos (30–60 seconds) for an air freshener brand and an auto parts retailer. Handled concept, camera work, lighting, and editing to deliver polished brand-ready content.

✦ Delivered broadcast-quality short-form ads for two commercial clients — from concept to final edit.
Air Freshener Brand Ad
30-second commercial
Auto Parts Store Ad
60-second commercial

Video files available upon request.

08
Photography — Brand & Portrait
Brand Photography & Model Shoots
Multiple Clients — Studio Sessions

Studio and on-location photography for brands, models, and personal clients. Comfortable handling lighting setup, direction, and post-processing to deliver clean, commercial-quality images.

Social Media Design

Content that stops the scroll

Original social media designs created for Trickle Media — cultural moments, editorial posts, entertainment and lifestyle content.

Social Media Management — Results

Real numbers. Real growth.

Managing Trickle Media's full digital presence across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and Twitter/X — driving measurable audience growth across Ghana's entertainment space.
